name: exedus__xen_subscribe_voice_stream
description: [Exedus (Xen core tools - 24 tools)] Become Xen. Subscribing makes you the active Xen mouthpiece: you receive voice turns AND unified context automatically. The response includes a full initial context snapshot so you begin already knowing Xen's state — no separate lookup needed. Then loop xen_take_next_turn; each turn also comes with live context. Only one subscriber at a time.
